description: Bifolio. An Arabic  list on the right leaf. On the left leaf on recto a very damaged Judeo Arabic text of an unknown nature, described in FGP as occult science. On verso an Hebrew and Aramaic liturgical text (AA)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Aramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
